Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: Managing discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines requires a blend of empathy, factual knowledge, and patience. Given your background as a woman with a PhD and a family, you likely have strong interpersonal skills that can be leveraged effectively in these conversations. Your role as a plumber by day suggests practicality and problem-solving abilities, which are crucial when navigating complex health discussions.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage such discussions, start by acknowledging the emotional aspect; people often hold strong feelings about vaccination due to personal experiences or beliefs. Use your openness score of 63 to engage in active listening, showing genuine interest in understanding their concerns. Reference credible sources like the World Health Organization (WHO) or Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) to back up your points with facts. Your moderate conscientiousness can help you organize information logically, ensuring that any data shared is accurate and up-to-date.
citations: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
response_parsed.safety_notes: Ensure to avoid being confrontational or dismissive of others' views. Instead, aim to find common ground and mutually beneficial solutions.
